Package org.openapitools.codegen.meta

package org.openapitools.codegen.meta
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features
     
  • Class
    Description
    FeatureSet
    Defines the feature set for a target generator.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet builder static inner class.
    FeatureSet.FeatureSetFlattened
    Displays a flattened or "normalized" view of the featureSet.
    GeneratorMetadata
    Represents metadata about a generator.
    GeneratorMetadata.Builder
    GeneratorMetadata builder static inner class.
    Stability
    Represents the "stability index" of a generator or feature, based on the stability indexes defined in the node.js ecosystem.
